intro: Ouratea pycnostachys, commonly known as the "Ouratea tree," is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include the potential treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant effects. The bioactive constituents of Ouratea pycnostachys include flavonoids, saponins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
